Name: Castelo de São Jorge
Address: R. de Santa Cruz do Castelo, 1100-129 Lisboa
Tips: Moorish ramparts, resident peacocks, camera obscura. Book online, go at opening.

Name: Miradouro das Portas do Sol
Address: Largo das Portas do Sol, 1100 Lisboa
Tips: Postcard sweep over Alfama's rooftops to the river.

Name: Miradouro de Santa Luzia
Address: R. de Santa Luzia, Alfama, Lisboa
Tips: Rose-draped, azulejo-tiled terrace right next door.

Name: Mosteiro de São Vicente de Fora
Tips: Azulejo cloisters, Bragança Royal Pantheon, rooftop terrace.

Name: Feira da Ladra
Tips: Tuesdays and Saturdays only. Antique azulejos, old Port bottles.

Name: Panteão Nacional
Tips: Baroque dome, Amália Rodrigues's tomb. Climb to the dome terrace.

Name: Sé de Lisboa
Tips: Lisbon's oldest church (1147). Roman garum tanks beneath the floor.

Name: Zé da Mouraria
Tips: Iconic bacalhau à minhota. Line forms out the door by noon.

Name: Igreja de São Roque
Tips: Gilded Chapel of St John the Baptist, actually built in Rome.

Name: Cemitério dos Prazeres
Tips: Cypress-lined streets of grand mausoleums. Views to the 25 de Abril bridge.

Name: Clube de Fado
Address: R. de São João da Praça 92, 1100-521 Lisboa
Tips: Prestige fado house. Book 1-2 weeks ahead.
